name: 09 - Realistic Cross-Dimensional Analysis
description: Analyst questions that slice the data by two or more dimensions — status x priority, category x source, entity x assignee — plus percentage breakdowns and rank-by-share. Every question has a clean ExpectedSql. Designed to stress multi-lookup joins, conditional aggregation, and HAVING on multi-key groups.

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts grouped by status and priority.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, p.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts grouped by category and source.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, src.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name, src.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per entity broken down by status.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, s.Name AS Status, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name, s.Name ORDER BY e.Name, Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: What percentage of tickets are resolved or closed?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.IsClosedState = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS PctResolvedOrClosed FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show the percentage share of tickets per priority.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Cnt, 100.0 * COUNT(*) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0),0) AS Pct FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Which categories have more than 10 tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show average resolution time in hours per priority.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY AvgHours DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show average resolution time in hours per category.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY AvgHours DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many open tickets are there per priority?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS OpenCount FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY OpenCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show the distribution of tickets by source.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT src.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY src.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show distinct ticket categories currently in use.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT c.Name AS Category FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: For each status, show the top category by ticket count.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH x AS (SELECT s.Name AS Status, c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, c.Name) SELECT Status, Category, Cnt FROM x WHERE rn = 1

Scenarios.Question: How many critical priority tickets are still open?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Which categories have an average resolution time longer than 24 hours?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name HAVING AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) > 24 ORDER BY AvgHours DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show distinct ticket statuses currently in use.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT s.Name AS Status FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show the percentage share of tickets per entity.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Cnt, 100.0 * COUNT(*) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0),0) AS Pct FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Cnt DESC
